heading: Saving provisions
label: 620h Saving provisions
text: Nothing contained in this chapter shall be construed to alter, amend, repeal, construe, interpret, modify, or be in conflict with the provisions of the Boulder Canyon Project Act () [ et seq.], the Boulder Canyon Project Adjustment Act () [ et seq.], the Colorado River Compact, the Upper Colorado River Basin Compact, the Rio Grande Compact of 1938, or the treaty with the United Mexican States (Treaty Series 994).45 Stat. 105743 U.S.C. 61754 Stat. 77443 U.S.C. 618
notes: References in TextThe Boulder Canyon Project Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to subchapter I (§ 617 et seq.) of chapter 12A of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see and Tables.act Dec. 21, 1928, ch. 4245 Stat. 1057section 617t of this titleThe Boulder Canyon Project Adjustment Act, referred to in text, is , , which is classified generally to subchapter II (§ 618 et seq.) of chapter 12A of this title. For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see section 618 of this title and Tables.act July 19, 1940, ch. 64354 Stat. 774o
